description.content:
Webhook event reference for Truework. Subscribers receive `order.completed` events when every verification on an order has finished, and `verification_request.state.change` events as individual verifications transition through their state machine (pending-approval, processing, action-required, completed, canceled, invalid). Each webhook instance is associated with a token delivered in the `X-Truework-Token` header so handlers can authenticate the call.


Contact Support:
 Name: Truework Implementations
 Email: implementations@truework.com
